name: Diabolik Lovers: Marionette
description:
Diabolik Lovers: Marionette

"••• Caught in an unforeseen twist of fate, you find yourself as a marionette; forcibly cast into the harrowing position of a sacrificial bride. You are ensnared by thousands of strings to be in the servitude of six insatiable vampires known as the Sakamakis..."

"••• The weight of your survival rests upon the delicate balance of every action and syllable you utter. With each step, and each word, you are walking a tightrope between life, and the abyss of death, or as another wax doll. In this perilous dance of a cage, you must tread with the utmost caution throughout their enigmatic world, where the slightest misstep could seal your fate. Or so your strings could be cut at any moment. May fortune favor your path in this treacherous cage ahead."
creator: astral.8
